dashboard_welcome: Here's what's happening with your complaints today.
ai_chatbot_text: Get instant help from our AI assistant. Ask questions or track status.
submit_desc: Create a new complaint with image or audio evidence using our system.
view_desc: See all your submitted complaints and track their live progress.
chat_user_example: I need to report a road damage issue
chat_bot_reply: I can help you with that! First, provide the location.
hero_description: Submit and track your complaints effortlessly with AI-powered assistance. Get instant responses, multimodal submissions, and real-time updates.
chat_hello: 👋 Hello! I'm your SmartGriev AI assistant. How can I help you today?
chat_user_report: I need to report a road damage issue
chat_bot_guidance: I can help you with that! Let me guide you through the complaint submission process. First, could you provide the location of the damage?
track_manage: Track and manage all your submitted complaints effortlessly.
ai_chat_bot: 👋 Welcome to SmartGriev Support. I can help you file a complaint, check status, or answer city-service queries. How can I assist you today?
